project.name: SGA GHS Label System
project.description: Python warehouse application for GHS chemical safety labels with SAP Business One integration.

phases: Phase 2: Architecture Refactoring (SQLAlchemy ORM, Local Fallback)
Phase 5: DevOps, Release Management & Monitoring (Auto-updater, Logs)

key_files.smart_label.py: GHS data resolution and database operations
key_files.run_full_sql_migration_optimized.py: SQL Server schema enforcement and data ingestion script
key_files.SQL_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: Details of the SQL integration and fallback architecture.

notes_for_ai: ALWAYS check .env for credentials instead of hardcoding them.
Ensure 'TrustServerCertificate=no' in production for SQL connections.
When modifying the database layer, ensure the dual-mode offline fallback (CSV) is maintained.
GUI updates must not freeze the main thread; use threading/async where applicable.
